description: HumanUniqueness proof with an identityTreeRoot that is not in the accepted root window. The circuit will produce a valid witness for the provided root, but the on-chain verifier must reject the root as stale (not in the recent-roots ring buffer).
failure_reason: identityTreeRoot does not match the Merkle root computed from the provided path — the circuit constraint merkleCheck.root === identityTreeRoot will fail during witness generation because the stale root does not correspond to any valid tree containing this identity commitment
